description:
You are the Operations Manager at Luma Inc. performing a monthly store configuration audit. Update the following store operation settings in the Default Config scope to align with new Q3 policies: 

Enable the Persistent Shopping Cart with a 'Persistence Lifetime' of 30 days (calculated and entered in seconds), 'Remember Me' enabled, 'Clear Persistence on Sign Out' set to No, and 'Persist Shopping Cart' set to Yes. Enable 'Allow Guest Subscription' for Newsletters. Update the 'Contact Us' recipient email ('Send Emails To') to support@luma.com. Disable the Wishlist functionality completely. 

If not logged in, use admin / Admin1234!.
